texto: You will make all kinds of mistakes
autor: but as long as you are generous and true and also fierce you cannot hurt the world or even seriously distress her. She was meant to be wooed and won by youth.
explicacao: Citação de but as long as you are generous and true and also fierce you cannot hurt the world or even seriously distress her. She was meant to be wooed and won by youth. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “You will make all kinds of mistakes” articula reflexao, winston-s-churchill, my-early-life em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como my-early-life e 1874-1904.
